Keep the terminal interval as mathematics: τ∈[0,H].

Keep the spaced terminal interval as mathematics: τ ∈ [0,H].

Keep the NBSP terminal interval as mathematics: τ ∈ [0,H].

Keep the zero-width terminal interval as mathematics: τ​∈​[0,H].

x_u(t)=(c_u,s_u,v_u,q_u)

q=1→q=2→q=3→q=4

Zint=Tmα∩RUA

is an explicit calligraphic label.

       local overlap   \mathcal{T}_m^\alpha┌───────────┐│ blue ellipse │ \mathcal{Z}_{int}│      ∩      ││ green box    │└───────────┘   \mathcal{R}_{UA}
control action→ ‖ v_u(t)

Negative controls: version 2.9.0, date 2026-06-29, URL https://example.com/a/b, and A/B testing remain text.
